## Editing.IValidatingEditorContext interface

Editor context with validating wrapper access. Combines base editor context with a validating property for raw input handling.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IValidatingEditorContext<T, TBaseId extends string = string, TId extends string = string> extends IEditorContext<T, TBaseId, TId> 
```
**Extends:** [IEditorContext](./ts-chocolate.editing.ieditorcontext.md)<!-- -->&lt;T, TBaseId, TId&gt;
